⛏️ Minecraft Mods

Published on CurseForge under Ibexis.

Into the Mimic Reforged

The remake from scratch with original textures, models, skins, etc of Into the Mimic.

View on CurseForge →

Into the Mimic

A simple and short mod about Secret of the Mimic, because other FNAF mods don't have it yet.

View on CurseForge →

Sculk Villager

Adds a new Zombie Villager-like creature, the Sculk Villager, which attacks many mobs and corrupts villagers.

View on CurseForge →
